title: EQ - Custom EQ, save a custom EQ, change some values, Save EQ
scenario: Custom EQ values are not persisted correctly after re-saving modified settings in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Select a custom EQ preset or create a new one
Adjust some frequency band sliders to new positions
Observe the saved frequency band slider positions
expected: The custom EQ preset retains the newly saved frequency band slider positions after re-entering the Equalizer screen.
